channel.title: Posts on The Laws Of The Universe
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on The Laws Of The Universe

item.title: Deep_Learning
item.description: I thought with all the hype around chatgpt I would take a dive into creating my own AI.

item.title: The Island Of Stability
item.description: The Period Table of the incomplete elements. This lie is a nice simplification to have but there is more to know about the elements.
